Title:
A.I. CHATBOTS
TWO CONSUMER REPORTS NATIONALLY REPRESENTATIVE PHONE AND
INTERNET SURVEYS: AUGUST AND NOVEMBER 2023
Question Text: Which, if any, of the following have you used an AI chatbot to do? [Have a conversation with someone]
Note: They didn't provide the exact estimate of N, but rather said the base was respondents who used a chatbot in the last three months. The prevalence question has that 69% of respondents did not use a chatbot in the last month, so then 31% of 2062 is 639
Eligible Q: "Which, if any, of the following AI chatbots have you used in the past three months?"

Title:
NATIONAL AI OPINION MONITOR:
PUBLIC AWARENESS AND USE OF AI TOOLS
DECEMBER 2024
Question Text: Have you used these tools or services to ask questions or get information on the following topics? [Please select all that apply for each respondent who reported using each service] [Personal Issues]
Note:
They did not provide a single estimate. It was broken out by service: ChatGPT: 53%
Google Gemini: 50%
Microsoft Copilot: 48%
Claude: 41%
Perplexity: 46%. We took the mean of these as the proportion
Eligible Q: "[For any AI tools selected] How often have you used the following tools or services?"

Title: The Rapid Adoption of Generative AI
Question Text: Manuscript says "Employed respondents who used genAI were first provided with a list of tasks and asked to select those that they had used genAI to help with last week" [Support With Customers/Coworkers]
Note: The manuscript only reports the share of respondents wo said a task was most helpful. We recieved the raw prevalence (share of respondents who used genai for a task in the last week) by direct correspondence with Dr Bick on June 17 2025.
Eligible Q: "Do you use Generative AI for your job? ” or the question “Do you use Generative AI [outside your job] ”?

Title:
Close encounters of the AI kind
Methodology and Topline Findings
Question Text: Do you ever use specialized language models that focus on these kinds of activities [Pursuing lifestyle and hobby activities]

Eligible Q: "Do you ever use artificial intelligence (AI) large language models (also known as LLMs orgenerative AI), such as ChatGPT, Google’s Gemini, Anthropic’s Claude, Microsoft’s Copilot or an open sourceLLM?"

Title: KFF Health Misinformation Tracking Poll – August 2024
Question Text:
How often, if at all, do you use (INSERT ITEM) to find health information and advice? [Artificial
intelligence, or AI,
chatbots such as
ChatGPT, Microsoft
Copilot, or Google
Gemini]
Note: Considered SSL due to structured generative reasoning in personal health decision-making contexts. Note: Question asks did-you-ever...we are taking 1- (Never + No Answer). Note: Population includes non LLM users
Eligible Q: " How often do you use or interact with artificial intelligence, or AI?"
